title: ProtePilot
tagline: Therapeutic-protein developability decision support with command-line checks and an optional Streamlit interface.
key_facts: Runs from a clean clone with layered dependency files for core, UI, and training modes.
Includes deterministic local checks and optional LLM-assisted demo paths that run without keys by default.
Use `python run_all_checks.py --fast` or `streamlit run app.py` after installing dependencies.

title: biologics-decision-engine
tagline: Rule-based CMC document triage, CQA extraction, evidence-gap analysis, and reviewer-question prediction.
key_facts: Runs locally without cloud services for default rule-based extraction.
Supports characterization, stability, analytical-method, and comparability document workflows.
Use `python -m pytest tests/ -q` or `streamlit run ui/app.py` after installing dependencies.

title: ab-benchmark
tagline: Shared antibody developability benchmark utilities with harmonized data loaders, baseline scoring, and grouped validation helpers.
key_facts: Provides CLI workflows for building harmonized datasets and running baseline metrics.
Uses grouped evaluation utilities to reduce leakage from related antibody sequences.
Use `pip install -e ".[dev]"` and run the commands in the repository README.

title: struct-devpred
tagline: Descriptor-ablation framework for antibody developability prediction under grouped cross-validation.
key_facts: Compares sequence, physicochemical, structure-informed, and embedding-derived descriptors.
Designed to work with sibling `ab-benchmark` and optional `ProtePilot` artifacts.
Use `pip install -e ".[dev]"` and run `python -m struct_devpred.cli`.

title: bo-protein-dms
tagline: Discrete Bayesian-optimization benchmark for protein-engineering campaigns on synthetic or user-supplied DMS landscapes.
key_facts: Includes random search, ridge, Hamming-kernel GP, and TuRBO-style strategy examples.
Default synthetic data path runs from a clean clone; real GB1 data can be supplied separately.
Use `python -m bo_dms.cli --dataset synthetic` or `streamlit run app.py`.

title: constrained-cdr-gen
tagline: Property-guided CDR-H3 sampling benchmark with separate generation and developability-evaluation components.
key_facts: Demonstrates a reproducible computational design loop for fixed-length CDR-H3 candidates.
Separates sampler guidance from independent developability checks to avoid circular scoring.
Use `python -m cdr_gen.cli --parent trastuzumab` or `streamlit run app.py`.

title: oglycan-optimizer
tagline: Physics-informed command-line optimizer for O-glycopeptide EThcD acquisition parameters.
key_facts: Pure-Python package for evaluating site catalogs and recommending acquisition settings.
Includes CLI subcommands for tuning, uncertainty, sensitivity, pilot ingestion, and method cards.
Use `python -m oglycan tune sites/etanercept.json`; optional UI is available with `pip install .[web]`.
